---
title: ""
about:
  template: solana

---

# Tim Klustner

<p class="description">Conflict geographer crowdsourcing ground truth. Based in Seattle. </p>

<p class="featured-header">Featured — Michoacán & Guerrero</p>

![](charts/assets/mich_guer_binned_road_proximity.png)

*"For armed groups unable to dominate transnational drug routes, the same connective spaces that civilians depend on for daily routines also expose local populations to persistently high levels of risk."*<br>
*[Read the full paper →](papers/mich_guer.html)*


Available for contract analysis, field data systems, and geospatial pipelines: from satellite to street level. [Get in touch →](mailto:timklustner@proton.me)
